title: Implement MAP-only session replay builder
description: Follow-up from approved TASK-172: implement the first MAP-only session replay/read-model CLI using events.jsonl, task JSON, and map.db. Do not ingest hcom or transcripts in this slice.
acceptance_criteria: CLI can build a disposable local SQLite replay index from MAP events, task JSON, and map.db without writing canonical task/event/workflow sources.
CLI exposes status, task, agent, and trace read queries with deterministic JSON output suitable for mission-control integration.
Build/status report drift findings for malformed events, missing task references, mirror validation failure, and source high-water metadata.
Focused tests and full MAP validators pass; hcom ingestion and transcript indexing remain deferred.
